topics.name: ND I & ND II: IMT Laboratory Techniques, Chemistry, and Biology Options
topics.description: SLT 111 General Laboratory Techniques, Analytical Chemistry, Microbiology, and Physics Techniques.

subtopics.name: SLT 111 & SLT 121: General Laboratory Management & Safety (IMT)
objectives: Understand laboratory safety regulations, chemical storage, sterilization, and equipment calibration
Perform titrimetric, gravimetric, and spectrophotometric laboratory analyses

subtopics.name: SLT 211: Biological and Chemical Laboratory Techniques
objectives: Prepare culture media, slide staining, microscopy, and chemical reagent standardization

topics.name: HND I & HND II: Advanced Instrumentation, Biochemistry Option, and IMT Project
topics.description: Chromatography, Spectroscopy, Clinical Biochemistry, Industrial Microbiology, and HND Thesis.

subtopics.name: SLT 311 & SLT 411: Advanced Analytical Instrumentation
objectives: Operate HPLC, Gas Chromatography (GC), Atomic Absorption Spectroscopy (AAS), and UV-Vis spectrophotometers

subtopics.name: SLT 499: Final HND Science Laboratory Research Project
objectives: Conduct independent laboratory research and defend thesis before IMT Applied Sciences board
